title: Frying Techniques
description: Learn how to fry foods safely and effectively, achieving a crispy texture.

steps.instruction: Heat oil in a deep pan or fryer to the appropriate temperature.
Dredge or batter your food before placing it in the hot oil.
Carefully lower the food into the oil, avoiding splashes.
Fry until golden brown, turning as necessary.
Remove the food and drain on paper towels before serving.

safety_tips: Always use a thermometer to check oil temperature.
Keep a lid nearby to smother any potential grease fires.
Avoid overcrowding the pan to maintain oil temperature.
